items.desc: Switch TP-Link SG2210XMP-M2, Omada: A switch is an active network component that connects individual devices and other network elements. It is suitable for managing network traffic. The TP-Link SG2210XMP-M2, Omada SDN i…
items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link SG2210XMP-M2, Omada: A switch is an active network component that connects individual devices and other network elements. It is suitable for managing network traffic. The TP-Link SG2210XMP-M2, Omada SDN is made to be placed on the work desk or wall. The model features a switching capacity of 80 Gb/s. The Switch has 8 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. The switch dimensions are 226 × 131 × 35mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology ensures the switch doesn't get overloaded,  and it also lets you set up end station priority. The TP-Link device includes PoE technology that provides power and signal connection to end devices with a single LAN cable. The switch weighs 1150g. Key Features of the TP-Link SG2210XMP-M2, Omada SDN Switch For connecting end devices and other nodes 80 Gb/s switching capacity Offers 8 × RJ-45 ports TP-Link switch is designed for work desks or wall installation PoE (Power over Ethernet) technology support QoS (Quality of Service) option VLAN support
